document.title: WBW880A_NCC test report 4_4-2-2 WLAN 5G測試報告-測試數據
document.documentType: NCC test report appendix / WLAN 5G test data

sourceSummary.oneLine: Appendix 1 reports WLAN 5 GHz test results for radiated emissions, output power/bandwidth, peak power spectral density, band-edge conducted emissions, and RF exposure.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory assessment of WLAN 5 GHz radio performance against limits for UNII bands, unwanted emissions, output power, power spectral density, and MPE exposure.
keyPoints: Report number EM-NC190052 and case number C1M1902181 are shown throughout the appendix.
The device supports IEEE 802.11a/n/ac and was evaluated at low, middle, and high frequencies with worst modes included in the report.
30-1000 MHz and above-1000 MHz unwanted radiated emissions were measured in an anechoic chamber.
Maximum output power and 26 dB/6 dB bandwidth were measured from 2019/03/07 to 2019/03/14 at DC 3.3 V.
RF exposure at 20 cm used maximum transmit power 8.57 dBm and reported MPE 0.0077 mW/cm2 versus a 1 mW/cm2 standard value.

evidence.claim: The appendix is identified as test results for the device under test.
evidence.evidenceText: 附錄一 受測裝置之測試結果

evidence.claim: The test laboratory named in the appendix is 敦吉檢測科技股份有限公司.
evidence.evidenceText: 敦吉檢測科技股份有限公司案件編號:C1M1902181
evidence.pageTarget: 敦吉檢測科技股份有限公司

evidence.evidenceText: 支援 IEEE 802.11a/n/ac，依測試要求評估低、中、高頻率，並檢附三頻率之最差模式於此測試報告中。

evidence.claim: Unwanted emissions were measured in 30-1000 MHz and 1000 MHz to 40000 MHz ranges for selected modes.
evidence.evidenceText: 1.1. 30-1000MHz 頻率範圍，其他不必要發射量測; 1.2. 1000MHz 以上頻率範圍，其他不必要發射量測

evidence.claim: Restricted-band mixed emissions were measured according to technical specification section 2.7.
evidence.evidenceText: 對受測物裝置落於技術規範第 2.7 章節的禁用頻帶之混附發射以下列測試模式依規定分別進行量測

evidence.claim: Maximum output power and 26 dB/6 dB bandwidth testing was performed from 2019/03/07 to 2019/03/14 at DC 3.3 V.
evidence.evidenceText: 測試日期 2019/03/07 ~ 14 ... 測試電壓 DC 3.3V (JIG 透過筆記型電腦)
evidence.pageTarget: Maximum output power and bandwidth testing

evidence.claim: Peak power spectral density testing was performed from 2019/03/11 to 2019/03/14 at DC 3.3 V.
evidence.evidenceText: 3. 峰值功率頻譜密度之量測 測試日期 2019/03/11 ~ 14 ... 測試電壓 DC 3.3V (JIG 透過筆記型電腦)

evidence.claim: Band-edge RF conducted emissions testing was performed from 2019/03/12 to 2019/03/21 at DC 3.3 V.
evidence.evidenceText: 4. 頻帶邊緣之 RF 傳導發射之量測 測試日期 2019/03/12 ~ 21 ... 測試電壓 DC 3.3V (JIG 透過筆記型電腦)

evidence.claim: RF exposure measurement used a 20 cm human body distance.
The RF exposure calculation used maximum transmit power 8.57 dBm, maximum antenna gain 7.3 dBi, and reported MPE 0.0077 mW/cm2.
evidence.evidenceText: 最大發射功率(P): 8.57 dBm = 7.194 mW 最大天線增益(G): 7.3 dBi = 5.370 Numerical MPE (S) = (P*G) / (4*π*r2) = 0.0077 mW/cm2

evidence.claim: The MPE standard value is 1 mW/cm2 and the tested product value is 0.0077 mW/cm2.
evidence.evidenceText: 電磁波曝露量MPE標準值1mW/cm2，送測產品實測值為：0.0077mW/cm2

reviewFlags.reason: Document date is not stated as a single document issue date; only test dates are provided.
Revision or version is not present in the source text.
Authority/jurisdiction is inferred from sourcePath NCC naming; the body text does not explicitly identify the regulator.
Product model WBW880A is taken from sourcePath filename, not from the body text.
Some pages containing measurement plots appear OCR-fragmented, especially pages 49-73.
